title: Is this really Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Is this really Lilith...?             Quote Post by IkariRei » Fri May 28, 2010 3:00 pm Could it be Adam now that there's a Key of Nebuchadnezzer replacing him in the VIP suitcase. The mask of the current Lilith looks too much like the Angels' which are born from Adam and Mark06 looks exactly like the previous Lilith. And Kaworu's riding it I wonder what they mean with "this time they're trying to create a real God instead of a fake". Also source of this pic? There's scenes here i haven't seen yet. [Please reply in this thread . -staff] http://i285.photobucket.com/albums/ll75/kiratsuki/rebuild_of_evangelion_2_0_pics.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Fri May 28, 2010 3:16 pm So they changed Unit 06's skin from white to black, I wonder why. Another question is why would it need a mask? Only reason I can fathom right now is to prevent berserking. 06's couldn't have been "found" because that mask looks like it was sown on. Guess we'll have to wait until 3.0. Also source of this pic? There's scenes here i haven't seen yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Fri May 28, 2010 3:24 pm I don't think they changed it, it was inside a white suit on 1.0 right? I heard it somewhere

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Is this really Lilith..             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 28, 2010 4:20 pm IkariRei wrote: Could it be Adam now that there's a Key of Nebuchadnezzer replacing him in the VIP suitcase.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Fri May 28, 2010 4:38 pm Im agree with your questioning. In the TVseries we were to believe at first that Lilith was Adam. Who knows maybe they plan on tricking us again. But, that fatass looks like lillith's

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri May 28, 2010 6:28 pm Since Misato calls the one in Dogma Lilith when she takes Shinji to her, I'd say they are still sticking to that idea. Nobody called the one on the Moon anything except Mark 06. Also Kaworu syncs with Adam clones, not Lilith clones so he wouldn't work with Mark 06 if it was Lilith, unless they really change things around.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri May 28, 2010 10:47 pm I'm going to say that the creature in Central Dogma is Lilith since it has breasts. It can't be anything but Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri May 28, 2010 10:58 pm Well, if you think Lilith is the only thing in Eva with tits you clearly aren't paying attention.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat May 29, 2010 12:13 am ZapX wrote: Well, if you think Lilith is the only thing in Eva with tits you clearly aren't paying attention.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 29, 2010 12:30 am Take further conversation on the pachinko stuff here, please. (Try not to have "asides" like that when you create threads in the future, IkariRei -- one defined topic per thread, otherwise it gets messy!) http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5952 IkariRei wrote: I wonder what they mean with "this time they're trying to create a real God instead of a fake".

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 29, 2010 3:12 am Reichu wrote: Breasts hang off the pectorals in a pretty particular way...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat May 29, 2010 11:53 am NemZ wrote: ...unless that weird scar is from where they implanted an internal push-up?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat May 29, 2010 12:18 pm Azathoth wrote: Does NME Misato have the same scar?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat May 29, 2010 12:47 pm So I think we can safely speculate that Misato has Lilith's soul this time around?

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Is this really Lilith..             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sat May 29, 2010 2:24 pm IkariRei wrote: I wonder what they mean with "this time they're trying to create a real God instead of a fake".

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat May 29, 2010 6:36 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: So I think we can safely speculate that Misato has Lilith's soul this time around?

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Sun May 30, 2010 7:18 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: So I think we can safely speculate that Misato has Lilith's soul this time around?

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon Dec 27, 2010 11:01 am konfunoodle wrote: Im agree with your questioning. In the TVseries we were to believe at first that Lilith was Adam. Who knows maybe they plan on tricking us again. But, that fatass looks like lillith's

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Dec 27, 2010 4:38 pm This all implies that Kaworu even gives a shit about whatever's down there. He essentially has a near-perfect Adam Clone already(?) and his motives are clearly different this time around. Therefore Lilith's identity might not have any necessary dramatic relevance, and they just told us straight up to get that setting element out of the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon Dec 27, 2010 6:50 pm AuraTwilight wrote: This all implies that Kaworu even gives a shit about whatever's down there. He essentially has a near-perfect Adam Clone already(?) and his motives are clearly different this time around. Therefore Lilith's identity might not have any necessary dramatic relevance, and they just told us straight up to get that setting element out of the way.
